topics: What is Kriti and Arts Education
Dance and Theatre — Moving and Performing
subject: Arts

sections.heading: 🗺️ The Quest Begins — What is Kriti?
sections.body: Kriti is your magical spellbook for Arts! It takes you on a grand quest through four amazing realms — Visual Arts, Music, Dance, and Theatre. Just like a wizard needs to learn different spells, you will explore drawing, singing, dancing, and acting. Think of it like the different events in a school annual function — every child has a power waiting to be discovered!
keyPoints: Kriti is the Class 6 Arts textbook with four sections — Visual Arts (Yellow), Music (Blue), Dance (Pink), and Theatre (Purple)
The quest is all about creativity — expressing yourself and enjoying the journey of making art
Art is for EVERY student — no matter who you are, there is a place for you in this realm!

sections.heading: 🎨 The Visual Arts Realm — Eyes Wide Open!
sections.body: In the Visual Arts realm, your eyes are your most powerful weapon! You will learn to really look at things around you — like the pattern on a rangoli, the shape of a mango, or the colours of Holi — and then bring them to life on paper. You will also learn cool wizard-level skills like mixing colours, making natural colours from plants, and even creating your own seals and flipbooks!
keyPoints: Drawing exercises sharpen your observation — like a detective noticing every tiny detail around you
You will explore colour mixing — just like mixing different dal and sabzi to create new flavours!
You will also discover famous Indian artists and art traditions from your own state and region

sections.heading: 🎵 The Music Realm — The Power of Sound
sections.body: Music is everywhere in India — from Diwali songs to cricket victory celebrations, from a mother's lullaby to the dhol at a wedding! In this realm of your quest, you will discover that music is not just entertainment — it is a language that connects every human heart. You will explore different types of music from across our country and learn how music and instruments are part of every festival and ceremony.
keyPoints: Music is part of every celebration in India — national festivals, weddings, religious occasions and more
India has a treasure of musical styles and instruments spread across different regions — each one unique
Some music concepts may be new to you — be brave, young wizard, and explore them with curiosity!

sections.heading: 💃 Dance and Theatre Realm — Your Body Tells a Story
sections.body: In the Dance and Theatre realms, YOUR body becomes the magic wand! Dance is about moving to express feelings — like how you jump with joy when India wins a cricket match. Theatre is like enacting a story on stage — just like the Ram Leela you may have seen during Dussehra. Both these art forms help you build confidence, work in a team, and tell stories without even needing words.
keyPoints: Dance uses movement and expressions to share feelings — every culture in India has its own dance style
Theatre is storytelling through acting — like bringing your favourite comic book to life on a stage
Both dance and theatre are for everyone — they build teamwork, confidence, and creative power

sections.heading: 🏆 Mastery Unlocked — Why Arts Matters
sections.body: Arts is not just a subject — it is a superpower for life! When you draw, sing, dance, or act, you train your brain to think creatively, observe carefully, and feel deeply. Just like a cricketer practises daily to become a master batsman, practising art makes you a stronger thinker and a kinder human being. The best part? There are no wrong answers in art — your unique way of seeing the world IS the answer!
keyPoints: Art builds creativity, observation skills, and emotional understanding — all powerful life skills
India has a rich heritage of art forms that have been alive for hundreds of years — you are now part of that story
Explore, experiment, and enjoy — the quest of Kriti is YOUR personal adventure!

summary: Kriti is your Arts textbook for Class 6 — a grand quest through four exciting realms: Visual Arts, Music, Dance, and Theatre. In Visual Arts, you sharpen your eyes and hands to draw, colour, and create inspired by India's rich art traditions. In Music, you discover how sound and songs are woven into every festival and celebration across our country. In Dance and Theatre, your body becomes the storyteller — expressing feelings and enacting tales just like Ram Leela or a school play. Together, these four realms give every young wizard the power to create, express, and celebrate the beauty of life through art. Remember — in this quest, YOUR unique way of seeing the world is your greatest spell!
